name: Anytime Cake
recipeIngredient: Molly McButter or other butter flavoring
2 drops Rum, almond, or coconut extract
recipeInstructions: Mix ingredients well. Bake in a 4-inch x 4-inch pan coated with non-stick spray at 350 degrees for 15 minutes. 1 cup flour, 1 cup sugar twin (not Equal or Sweet n' low), 1/3 teaspoon baking powder, and 1/2 teaspoon baking soda (optional) are required.
